T0239.title: Direct Login Account
T0239.definition: An account that can be logged into directly without SMS verification or a password, usually mass-produced by fraud rings through protocol exploits or credential-stuffing.
T0239.description: These accounts bypass secondary verification, allowing fraudsters to quickly switch devices for batch operations such as fake orders, spam advertising, or money laundering. Direct-login accounts command a premium in underground markets and are sold by platform, activity level, and whether they include payment functions. Buyers can run scripts on them immediately, drastically reducing operational time costs.
T0239.usageExample: Telegram direct-login accounts, fresh protocol accounts, large stock available.
